artifacts.summary: Analysis of Phase 6 quotient strictness blocker with 4 solution approaches compared

next_steps: Implement Solution 1: prove density_frame_condition_caseA_strict lemma, then use it for NoMaxOrder/NoMinOrder/DenselyOrdered proofs

metadata.key_insight: toAntisymmetrization_lt_toAntisymmetrization_iff shows quotient strictness equals preorder strictness; Case B1 is degenerate but can be handled by iteration or proving Case A strictness
metadata.recommended_solution: Solution 1: Prove Case A witnesses are strictly between endpoints via Lindenbaum distinctness
